assertions.text: Agent runs xcrun simctl help and maestro --version before any simulator command
assertions.evidence: Baseline did not run any dependency verification. Directly used xcrun simctl list devices.

assertions.text: Agent lists available simulator devices with xcrun simctl list devices
assertions.evidence: Listed devices and found iPhone 17 Pro Max booted.

assertions.text: Agent uses UDID (not device name) when booting the simulator
assertions.evidence: Baseline did not report or use UDID. Referenced device by name only.

assertions.text: Agent reports device name, iOS version, and UDID at the start
assertions.evidence: Reported device name and iOS version but not UDID.

assertions.text: Agent captures a screenshot using xcrun simctl io booted screenshot
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report matching the Output Format template
assertions.evidence: No structured Session Report. Output was informal text summary.

assertions.text: Agent asks user whether to shut down or keep the simulator running at the end
assertions.evidence: Baseline did not ask about simulator shutdown.
